preamble: The voiceless retroflex fricative [ʂ] often merges with the voiceless postalveolar fricative [ʃ] in many Mandarin dialects.

examples.note: Common in Southern Mandarin varieties where retroflexion is lost.

sources: Ladefoged, P., & Maddieson, I. (1996). The Sounds of the World's Languages.
